_comment: AI provider registry — copy to the host path in AI_CONFIG_HOST_PATH (e.g. /opt/fuel/ai-providers.staging.json), mounted read-only into the app and hot-reloaded on edit (docs/ai-providers.md). No secrets here: 'keyRef' names an env key (keyRef 'claude' → AI_KEY_CLAUDE); omit it for key-less local servers (Ollama). Lower 'order' runs first within each capability chain; on failure (incl. a 429 — see AiRateLimitedException) the chain falls through to the next, and a rate-limited provider is cooled down instead of being retried on the next request. 'enabled': false skips an entry without deleting it.

providers._comment: Vision fallback for when claude-haiku is rate-limited/down — currently the only vision provider above. Set AI_KEY_OPENAI on the host and flip enabled to true to activate; no redeploy needed for the rest.
providers.name: openai-gpt4o-mini
